name: open-codex-ui
description: Electron desktop UI for the local Codex app-server.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/electron-app
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @open-codex-ui/codex-rpc && npm run build -w @open-codex-ui/opencodex-protocol && npm run build -w @open-codex-ui/opencodex-cache && npm run build -w @open-codex-ui/opencodex-core && npm run build -w @open-codex-ui/opencodex-ui
scripts.dist: npm run build:packages && npm run dist -w apps/electron-app
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build:packages && npm run dist:dir -w apps/electron-app
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck -w apps/electron-app
scripts.test: npm run rebuild:sqlite:node && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
